creator: bsd@dino.sk
text:
New version 0.3.8
Added more master sites

+MASTER_SITES=  http://www.becrux.com/pages/projects/clamcour/

 MAINTAINER=    bsd@dino.sk
 COMMENT=       ClamAV courier filter
fox# diff -u distinfo distinfo.old
